queries.exists: SELECT 1 FROM programs WHERE name = 'Amazon Corretto (x64)' AND publisher = 'Amazon' AND version LIKE '21.%';
queries.patched: SELECT 1 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM programs WHERE name = 'Amazon Corretto (x64)' AND publisher = 'Amazon' AND version LIKE '21.%' AND version_compare(version, '21.0.11.10') < 0);
